title: Bioinformatics Analyst
description: Join ICON's bioinformatics team to analyze complex genomic and clinical trial data. You'll develop algorithms and tools to support drug development and clinical research.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain bioinformatics pipelines for genomic analysis
Analyze large-scale genomic datasets and identify patterns
Collaborate with clinical researchers on data interpretation
Document analytical methods and create standard operating procedures
Troubleshoot data quality issues and validate analytical results
Present findings to cross-functional research teams

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
